title: arunner harness job manifest
description: Per-run manifest written by `tick.py --init` to run-NN/manifest.json. The queue/ and claimed/ job-NNNNN.json files wrap a plan entry under {job_id, run, entry}; this schema describes the run-NN/manifest.json projection the harness and any monitor read.

task_id.description: Matches the plan entry's task_id and the heartbeat task_id.

dispatch_mode.description: FR-62 widens this enum from ['subagent'] to ['subagent','shell'] (a pre-existing gap FR-62 makes reachable): a multi-step entry's per-step sub-run reuses this manifest schema at run-NN/steps/step-MM/manifest.json, and shell/adapter steps need 'shell' representable. Additive enum value; schema_version unchanged.

job_id.description: Job id (job-00001, …). The queue→claimed→results file moves key off this.

step_index.description: FR-62 (optional): 0-based index of this step within a multi-step entry. Present on per-step sub-run manifests (run-NN/steps/step-MM/manifest.json); absent for single-prompt entries.

step_count.description: FR-62 (optional): total step count for the entry. Pairs with step_index to render 'step N of M' (FR-27/59).
